chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: 3724 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ تَدَعُوا اَلتِّجَارَةَ فَتَهُونُوا اِتَّجِرُوا بَارَكَ اَللَّهُ لَكُمْ"

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3724 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Do not abandon trade, lest you become insignificant. Engage in trade-may Allah (swt) bless you."
